# Ranibizumab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Ranibizumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Ranibizumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>5 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Ranibizumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Ximluci is indicated in adults for:  The treatment of neovascular (wet) age-related macular degeneration (AMD) The treatment of visual impairment due to diabetic macular oedema (DME) The treatment of...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L1</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（100.0%）</li>
<li>diabetic retinopathy（100.0%）</li>
<li>diabetic cataract（100.0%）</li>
<li>craniostenosis cataract（100.0%）</li>
<li>mature cataract（100.0%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus type 2 associated cataract（100.0%）</li>
<li>immature cataract（100.0%）</li>
<li>tetanic cataract（100.0%）</li>
<li>nuclear senile cataract（100.0%）</li>
<li>cortical cataract（100.0%）</li>
<li>senile cataract（100.0%）</li>
<li>hemorrhagic disease of newborn（99.9%）</li>
<li>esotropia（99.8%）</li>
<li>primary release disorder of platelets（99.8%）</li>
<li>pseudo-von Willebrand disease（99.8%）</li>
<li>esophageal varices with bleeding（99.6%）</li>
<li>esophageal varices without bleeding（99.6%）</li>
<li>varicose disease（99.4%）</li>
<li>retinopathy of prematurity（99.4%）</li>
<li>Glanzmann thrombasthenia（99.2%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/ranibizumab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
